tweets.text:
#Bitcoin / bitcoin:native 

Thesis is still bounce until mid-August (high 60s, low 70s), then one last leg down in late August / September.

September is both seasonally and awful month for crypto & lines up with the ~900 days post halving milestone which has marked the bottom of the last several bear markets.

$100K this year feels like a bit of a stretch for a bounce from there - but I do believe a bounce from there hits new ATHs in 2027.
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
BREAKING: 10% chance Bitcoin hits $100,000 this year — an all-time low

A $100 trade pays out $1,000 if it happens https://t.co/08rKukGOvN

tweets.text: Despite a 30% drop in oil prices in June, YoY import prices rose 7.1%, and export prices rose 10.2%. This is far more indicative of the price increases U.S. consumers are actually paying than the 3.5% YoY increase in the June CPI and explains why inflation is such a big conern.
tweets.full_text: Despite a 30% drop in oil prices in June, YoY import prices rose 7.1%, and export prices rose 10.2%. This is far more indicative of the price increases U.S. consumers are actually paying than the 3.5% YoY increase in the June CPI and explains why inflation is such a big conern.

tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
SBI chose Ethereum to issue its stablecoin, built with @StartaleGroup.

JPYSC is Japan's first trust-based yen stablecoin, issued by SBI.

Why this matters:

SBI is one of Japan's largest financial groups. 78 million customers. ¥66 trillion (~$440bn) in securities AUM through https://t.co/J7miQnTz5D
